exploration_notes: **Kubernetes metrics exposition pattern**: Kubernetes uses a custom metrics stability framework built on top of prometheus client_golang. The core abstraction is `KubeRegistry` (registry.go) which wraps `prometheus.Registry` with version-aware metric hiding. A global singleton `defaultRegistry` is created in `legacyregistry/registry.go`, which exposes `MustRegister`, `Register`, `Handler()`, and `HandlerWithReset()`. Components register metrics via `legacyregistry.MustRegister()` (e.g., kubelet
